 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.5","title":"Task: Preserve and redefine headless mode for ftui TUI (TUI_HEADLESS=1, --once, CI stability)","description":"## Why
The repo already relies on headless TUI flows for CI (`tests/e2e_index_tui.rs`, `tests/tui_headless_smoke.rs`). The ftui TUI must continue to support these without flakiness.

## Requirements
- Keep semantics:
  - `cass tui --once` renders once and exits
  - `TUI_HEADLESS=1` disables interactive-only affordances and must not block on prompts
- Headless should still exercise:
  - terminal session setup/teardown code paths (or an explicit headless backend path)
  - view rendering at least once
  - core state init

## Deliverables
- A clear implementation strategy:
  - Either a headless runtime config that uses an in-memory presenter
  - Or a separate `run_tui_headless()` that uses ftui ProgramSimulator to render frames deterministically
- Update existing tests to use the new behavior.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `cargo test --test e2e_index_tui` passes reliably.
- Headless run produces no UI ANSI escape spam on stdout that could confuse robot JSON tests.
- Failure cases emit rich diagnostics to stderr (like PhaseTracker does today).","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:26:36.628140706Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T20:27:28.746732972Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T20:27:28.746707264Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ci","ftui","tests","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:26:36.628140706Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:42:36.471006434Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.6","title":"Task: TUI state persistence on ftui (migrate existing tui_state.json; saved views/history/density/etc)","description":"## Why
The Ratatui TUI persists non-trivial state across runs (query history, saved views, theme/density, etc.) via `TuiStatePersisted` inside `src/ui/tui.rs`. The ftui rewrite must preserve this continuity, or intentionally migrate it.

## Scope
- Inventory persisted fields in the current code (examples include: match_mode, search_mode, context_window, density_mode, has_seen_help, query_history, saved_views, help_pinned, per_pane_limit, ranking mode).
- Decide the persistence mechanism:
  - Keep JSON file format stable (preferred), with additive evolution.
  - Consider ftui runtime `state_persistence` features if they cleanly match.

## Deliverables
- A stable on-disk schema for TUI state:
  - versioned if needed
  - resilient to missing/unknown fields
- Migration plan:
  - reading old schema
  - writing new schema
- Tests:
  - unit tests for round-trip and migration

## Acceptance Criteria
- Existing users' state files do not crash the new TUI.
- `cass tui --reset-state` still works and is safe in headless mode.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:26:53.720871645Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T20:27:54.992921883Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T20:27:54.992875968Z","close_reason":"Completed: ftui state persistence + legacy migration + reset-state wiring","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","persistence","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:42:46.633076648Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:26:53.720871645Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.6","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:42:40.626861117Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7","title":"Task: Integrate ftui runtime logging (LogSink/stdio capture) with cass tracing + inline mode","description":"## Why
`cass` is extremely strict about stdout/stderr cleanliness in robot mode, and also wants stylish, informative logging for humans. ftui introduces a terminal writer and optional log sink/capture system; we should adopt it instead of ad-hoc printlns.

## Scope
- Decide where logs go in each mode:
  - robot/json: no noise on stdout, minimal stderr
  - interactive fullscreen: logs go to file (`cass.log`) + optional debug overlay
  - inline mode: allow logs to scroll while UI chrome stays anchored

## Deliverables
- A consistent logging story:
  - integrate tracing file appender with ftui runtime
  - optionally route selected app logs into an on-screen log viewer widget
- A debug overlay toggle that surfaces:
  - frame timing
  - diff stats
  - search latency
  - cache hit/miss

## Acceptance Criteria
- No accidental stdout writes from the TUI loop.
- When `CASS_TUI_DEBUG=1`, logs/metrics are rich and actionable.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:09.628443540Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T20:48:26.501279153Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T20:48:26.501251772Z","close_reason":"Implemented: debug overlay (CASS_TUI_DEBUG=1 + Alt+D) showing frame timing, search latency, cache stats, breakpoint info, search/ranking mode. Tracing file appender already integrated for TUI path. No accidental stdout writes verified by headless tests.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","logging","performance","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:09.628443540Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:42:56.150968571Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.7","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:42:50.535560503Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","title":"Epic: Feature parity on ftui (search bar, filters, results list, detail view, modals)","description":"## Goal
Re-implement the current Ratatui TUI feature set on ftui with no functional regression.

## Scope
Everything needed to make the ftui TUI a drop-in replacement for the current interactive experience:
- 3-pane layout (filters/top bar, results list, detail/preview)
- keyboard + mouse interaction
- query modes/ranking/density
- modals: help, command palette, export, updates, model install
- persistence: saved views + query history + theme/density, etc.

## Contract
This epic is validated against the parity matrix created in `coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.1`.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:22.410560426Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:22.410560426Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","parity","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:22.410560426Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

This epic is validated against the parity matrix created in `coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.1`.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:22.410560426Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T13:34:37.089567310Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T13:34:37.089490958Z","close_reason":"All children completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","parity","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:22.410560426Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","title":"Task: ftui layout foundation for cass (3-pane UI, adaptive sizing, density + border modes)","description":"## Why
The current layout uses ratatui Layout::default().direction().constraints().split() with hardcoded Percentage(70)/Percentage(30) splits. ftui-layout Flex solver provides CSS-like properties (min_size, max_size, basis, grow, shrink, gap) for much more responsive layouts.

## What (Merged from Phase 1C + 2B)

### view() Rendering Skeleton
Implement CassApp::view() composing the three-pane layout using ftui-layout Flex solver:
1. **Top area**: Search bar + filter pills + breadcrumbs
2. **Middle area**: Results panes (horizontal split) + detail pane
3. **Bottom area**: Status footer + help strip

Use ftui_layout::Flex with Direction::Column for main vertical split, Direction::Row for results vs detail.

### Responsive Breakpoints
- **Wide (>=160 cols)**: Side-by-side results + detail panes (current horizontal split)
- **Medium (100-159 cols)**: Stacked results/detail with adjustable ratio
- **Narrow (<100 cols)**: Single pane with tab switching

### Density Modes
- **Compact**: 3 lines per result (max results visible)
- **Cozy** (default): 5 lines per result (balanced)
- **Spacious**: 8 lines per result (detailed preview)

### Border Modes
- **Rounded Unicode** (default): ╭─ content ─╮
- **Plain ASCII**: +- content -+
- Toggle with Ctrl+B

### Adaptive Terminal Width
- Narrow (<80 cols): Minimal Unicode │ content │
- Normal (80-120): Rounded corners
- Wide (>120): Full decorations, double-line headers

## Implementation
- Replace all ratatui Layout::default() calls with ftui-layout Flex
- Flex gap for consistent spacing between sections
- Replace hardcoded Percentage with grow factors that can animate between states
- Initially render placeholder widgets in each area — actual widget implementations in 2noh9.3.2-3.8

## Tests
- Unit: Layout produces correct areas for each breakpoint (wide/medium/narrow)
- Unit: Density modes produce correct item heights
- Snapshot: Golden test for each breakpoint at representative terminal sizes
- E2E: Resize terminal → layout adapts correctly

## Acceptance Criteria
- Three-pane layout renders correctly at all common terminal sizes (80x24 through 300x80)
- Density toggle cycles through 3 modes
- Border toggle switches between Unicode and ASCII
- No layout overflow or clipping at minimum supported size (80x24)
- Layout changes feel smooth (animation budget from 2noh9.4.14)

## Depends On
- 2noh9.2.3 (Program skeleton running)
- 2noh9.3.15 (theme system for border/spacing tokens)","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:54.641723824Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:58:16.842345099Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:58:16.842319190Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","layout","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:39.786626523Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:27:54.641723824Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:40.207546073Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.10","title":"Task: Export modal on ftui (HTML export + encryption + progress + open-in-browser)","description":"## Goal
Port the interactive export UX currently available in the Ratatui TUI:
- export current conversation as self-contained HTML
- optional encryption (password / password-stdin style flow where appropriate)
- show progress + completion info (output_path, file_size, encrypted)
- open in browser option

## Notes
- Reuse existing export engine: `src/html_export` + `src/export.rs`.
- UI should be purely orchestration + progress rendering.

## Tests
- Unit tests for export state machine.
- E2E test: in a temp data dir with fixtures, export HTML and assert output exists and is non-empty.
- Logging: on failure, attach export progress logs like existing playwright E2E does.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Export behaves identically to current TUI for default paths and encryption toggles.
- No export UI prompts occur in headless mode.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:02.881561070Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:23:49.639979780Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T04:23:49.639891425Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["export","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:02.881561070Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:46.852159876Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:47.139802539Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.11","title":"Task: Update assistant UI on ftui (banner/modal, upgrade/skip/release-notes actions)","description":"## Goal
Port the update-check experience:
- detect when a newer release exists
- show an in-TUI banner/modal
- support actions: upgrade, skip this version, view notes, dismiss

## Notes
- Existing logic lives in `src/update_check.rs` and is already integrated into Ratatui UI.
- Headless mode must never prompt.

## Tests
- Unit tests for banner state transitions.
- E2E test: inject a fake update info and verify UI renders the banner in a snapshot.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Banner appears only in interactive mode and is dismissible with ESC.
- Actions behave safely (no destructive action without explicit confirmation).","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:12.965619165Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T05:10:15.505404624Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T05:10:15.505382483Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","updates"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:47.436452092Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:12.965619165Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:47.723585015Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.12","title":"Task: Semantic search model manager UI on ftui (availability, download/install, progress, policy)","description":"## Goal
Port the semantic model setup experience (currently integrated into Ratatui TUI):
- show semantic availability state
- allow download/install of model files (when policy allows)
- show progress (bytes, steps)
- handle failures gracefully

## Constraints
- No automatic downloads in headless mode.
- Respect existing env/policy behavior (`CASS_SEMANTIC_EMBEDDER`, headless constraints described in README).

## Notes
- Reuse existing implementation modules:
  - `src/search/model_download.rs`
  - `src/search/model_manager.rs`

## Tests
- Unit tests for semantic availability state machine.
- Snapshot tests for download modal/progress rendering.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Users can set up semantic search entirely from within the TUI.
- Failures provide actionable guidance (missing files list, expected paths).","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:24.423004893Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T05:10:01.075613786Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T05:10:01.075590943Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","semantic","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:48.007721141Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:24.423004893Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:48.310533342Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.13","title":"Task: Mouse support on ftui (hit testing, click-to-select, scroll panes, pill interactions)","description":"## Goal
Preserve and improve mouse support:
- click to select results
- scroll results/detail panes
- click pills/breadcrumbs to edit/remove

## Implementation Notes
- Use ftui frame hit grid registration.
- All actions must remain keyboard accessible (mouse is optional).

## Tests
- Simulation tests: inject mouse events and ensure correct Msg/actions.
- Snapshot tests for hit regions are not directly visible, but we can test:
  - selected state after click

## Acceptance Criteria
- Mouse capture is enabled only when supported and cleaned up on exit.
- Mouse behavior does not interfere with terminal scrollback in inline mode.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:33.757395033Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T05:10:04.147701160Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T05:10:04.147679229Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["a11y","ftui","mouse","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:48.671831919Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:33.757395033Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:49.240827469Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:48.955386040Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","title":"Task: Source provenance display + source filter UX on ftui (local/remote, per-host menus)","description":"## Goal
Port and polish multi-source UX:
- show source indicators in results (e.g., `[laptop]`)
- support cycling source filter (all → local → remote → all)
- support per-source selection menu

## Notes
- `README.md` documents `F11`/`Shift+F11` source filtering.
- Ensure provenance fields (`source_id`, `source_kind`, `workspace_original`) are visible in detail view/raw view.

## Tests
- Unit tests for source filter state transitions.
- Snapshot tests where mixed local+remote results show correct badges.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Source filtering works consistently with CLI flags (`cass search --source ...`).
- UI makes it obvious where a conversation originated.","notes":"Claimed by EmeraldBrook; starting source provenance + source filter UX on ftui.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:44.633710226Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:53:52.681324878Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T04:53:52.681301695Z","close_reason":"Completed","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","sources","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:44.633710226Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:49.524316108Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.14","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:49.787715127Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","title":"Task: Theme + style system implementation on ftui (presets, opt-outs, contrast/a11y patterns)","description":"## Goal
Implement the real ftui theme system used by all widgets:
- theme presets (dark/light/high-contrast + any existing cass presets)
- role-aware styling (user/assistant/tool/system)
- zebra stripes, gutters, highlights
- opt-out env vars (NO_COLOR, CASS_NO_COLOR, CASS_NO_ICONS, CASS_NO_GRADIENT, etc.)
- a11y patterns (when `CASS_A11Y=1`) so color is not sole carrier of meaning

## Notes
- This is the implementation counterpart of the spec work in `coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.2`.
- Prefer `ftui_style::{Theme, ThemeBuilder, StyleSheet, ColorProfile}`.

## Tests
- Unit tests for contrast computations and preset invariants.
- Snapshot tests across presets.

## Acceptance Criteria
- All core panes use the same token source (no ad-hoc per-widget colors).
- Truecolor terminals get premium theme; 8/16-color terminals get safe fallback.","notes":"## Completed scope

Implemented the ftui style system and wired it into the live ftui TUI view path.

### 1) New ftui style-system module
- Added `src/ui/style_system.rs` with:
  - `UiThemePreset` (`Dark`, `Light`, `Catppuccin`, `Dracula`, `Nord`, `HighContrast`)
  - `StyleOptions` env-driven opt-outs:
    - `NO_COLOR`, `CASS_NO_COLOR`
    - `CASS_NO_ICONS`
    - `CASS_NO_GRADIENT`
    - `CASS_A11Y`
    - optional profile override via `CASS_COLOR_PROFILE`
  - Color-profile downgrade flow (`TrueColor` / `Ansi256` / `Ansi16` / `Mono`) over entire theme slot set
  - `StyleContext` + semantic `StyleSheet` tokens for app/pane/text/status/row/role/gutter styling
  - A11y role-marker fallback strategy to ensure color is not the sole signal

### 2) App wiring to use semantic style tokens
- Updated `src/ui/app.rs`:
  - Added style state in `CassApp` (`theme_preset`, `style_options`)
  - Added `resolved_style_context()` and `selected_hit()` helpers
  - Integrated style context with theme toggle and state-load flows
  - Implemented actual ftui `view()` rendering using semantic tokens (query/header, results pane, detail pane, status line)
  - Added responsive breakpoint + density-aware row rendering helpers

This moves ftui rendering off ad-hoc colors and onto a centralized token source.

### 3) Acceptance-criteria alignment
- Presets + opt-outs: implemented.
- Contrast/a11y patterning: implemented in style context + role markers.
- Truecolor vs fallback profiles: implemented via downgrade pass.
- Core pane token source: implemented in current ftui view rendering path.

## Validation
- `cargo fmt --check` ✅
- `cargo check --all-targets` ✅
- `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅
- `cargo test style_system::tests --lib` ✅ (8 tests)
- `cargo test ui::app::tests --lib` ✅ (11 tests)

## Notes
- Existing workspace is multi-agent and contains unrelated in-flight changes outside this bead; this work was kept focused to `src/ui/style_system.rs` and `src/ui/app.rs` for style-system delivery.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:58.811941817Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-06T18:56:13.274010365Z","closed_at":"2026-02-06T18:42:17.883013681Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["a11y","ftui","style","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:38.553479922Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:38.962901148Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:39.370250843Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.15","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:30:58.811941817Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","title":"Task: FocusGraph navigation system on ftui (directional traversal, focus trapping, focus ring)","description":"## Why
The current TUI uses a simple FocusRegion enum (Results/Detail) with manual tracking and focus_flash_until timer. ftui provides a proper FocusGraph for navigation that handles the complexity of modals, nested widgets, and directional movement.

## What
Replace FocusRegion with ftui_widgets::focus::FocusGraph. Define focus nodes:
1. **SearchBar** (text input focus)
2. **FilterPills** (each pill focusable for edit/delete)
3. **ResultsList** (item selection focus)
4. **DetailPane** (scroll focus)
5. **CommandPalette** (modal focus trap)
6. **ExportModal** (modal focus trap)
7. **HelpOverlay** (modal focus trap)

FocusGraph handles:
- Directional navigation (Up from Results → SearchBar, Down from SearchBar → Results)
- Tab/Shift+Tab cycling through all nodes
- FocusTrap ensures modal focus doesn't leak to background widgets
- Visible focus ring indicator (colored border or glow effect) on focused widget

## Implementation
- Use frame.register_hit() for each focusable region
- FocusTrap activated when any modal is open
- Focus ring rendered as themed border highlight (uses agent accent colors)
- Replaces manual focus_region tracking and focus_flash_until timer

## Tests
- Unit: FocusGraph navigation sequence tests (Tab cycles, directional moves)
- Unit: Modal focus trapping prevents escape
- Snapshot: Focus ring renders correctly in each theme
- E2E: Full keyboard navigation flow (search → results → detail → modal → back)

## Acceptance Criteria
- All existing focus transitions preserved (no regression)
- Tab order matches logical UI flow
- Modals trap focus; Esc releases
- Focus ring visible in all 6+ themes with WCAG contrast
- CASS_DISABLE_ANIMATIONS=1 disables focus transition animations

## Depends On
- 2noh9.3.1 (layout foundation must exist first)
- 2noh9.2.3 (Program skeleton must be running)","notes":"AzureElk claiming: FocusGraph navigation system","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:18.698317676Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T13:07:15.260364747Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:29.107442839Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:18.698317676Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.16","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:26.431410925Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.17","title":"Task: Clipboard integration via OSC52 on ftui (copy paths, content, code blocks; works over SSH)","description":"## Why
The current TUI has basic clipboard via crossterm Paste events, but lacks reliable cross-terminal clipboard write support. OSC52 is the escape sequence that allows terminal apps to read/write the system clipboard without external dependencies — critical for multi-machine search (works over SSH).

## What
Leverage ftui-extras/clipboard for OSC52 clipboard integration:
1. **Copy selected result path+line** to clipboard (y or Ctrl+Y)
2. **Copy detail pane content** to clipboard (Ctrl+C in detail view without selection)
3. **Copy code block** from detail view (keybinding on specific code block)
4. **Copy search query** to clipboard
5. **Paste from clipboard** into search bar (Ctrl+V — unified API replacing raw crossterm Paste)

## Implementation
- ftui-extras clipboard module handles terminal capability detection (OSC52 support probe)
- Graceful fallback: if OSC52 not supported, try xclip/xsel/pbcopy
- Visual feedback: brief toast notification on successful copy ("Copied path to clipboard")
- Multi-select copy: Ctrl+Y copies all selected item paths separated by newlines

## Tests
- Unit: OSC52 escape sequence generation is correct
- Unit: Fallback chain works (OSC52 → xclip → noop with warning)
- Integration: Copy→paste roundtrip with ProgramSimulator
- E2E: Copy result path, verify clipboard content

## Acceptance Criteria
- Works over SSH sessions (OSC52 passthrough)
- Falls back gracefully on terminals without OSC52
- Toast confirms copy operation
- All existing y/Ctrl+Y behavior preserved

## Depends On
- 2noh9.2.3 (Program skeleton must be running)","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:34.903656751Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T04:49:30.169199463Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T04:49:30.169104446Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","tui","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.17","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T08:00:33.479689506Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.17","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:58:34.903656751Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","title":"Task: Search bar UX on ftui (text input, history, suggestions, debounce, match modes)","description":"## Goal
Recreate and improve the search bar experience:
- search-as-you-type with debounce (still sub-60ms perceived latency)
- Up/Down history navigation + de-dup
- Ctrl key edits (clear, delete token)
- Enter forces immediate search
- Match modes (standard/prefix) and wildcard fallback indicator
- Search modes (lexical/semantic/hybrid) toggle

## Implementation Notes
- Use `ftui-widgets::input` or `textarea` for editable text.
- State transitions should be reducer-style and unit-testable.
- Search execution should be cancelable/coalesced (avoid piling requests during typing).

## Tests
- Unit tests for query editing + history behavior.
- Deterministic simulation tests using `ftui_runtime::ProgramSimulator` for:
  - typing "auth" and seeing results update after debounce
  - Up/Down history nav

## Acceptance Criteria
- Behavior matches parity matrix for all documented keybindings.
- No input lag or dropped keystrokes under heavy rendering.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:10.964810150Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T00:41:06.586165597Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T00:41:06.586143136Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["ftui","search","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:41.039710098Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:41.442165218Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.2.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:40.617283649Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:10.964810150Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","title":"Task: Filters UI on ftui (agent/workspace/time/source + pills + breadcrumbs + pickers)","description":"## Goal
Port the full filter system:
- Agent filter picker
- Workspace filter picker
- Time filters (since/until, presets like today/week/30d)
- Source filter (local/remote/all and per-source selection)
- Clear filters and reset-state actions
- Pills UI with edit/remove + mouse interaction
- Breadcrumb bar showing current scope/modes (agent/workspace/date/ranking)

## Implementation Notes
- Prefer `ftui-widgets` list/table widgets for pickers.
- Time parsing must reuse existing `src/ui/time_parser.rs` logic (or an extracted shared parser), not re-invent.

## Tests
- Unit tests for filter state transitions and time preset cycling.
- Snapshot tests for pills rendering with many filters.
- E2E (simulated) test: apply agent + workspace + since filters and verify query request includes them.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Filters behave identically to current UI (per parity matrix).
- Pills remain usable at 80 columns; overflow strategy documented.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:24.546240365Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-07T01:11:15.258027151Z","closed_at":"2026-02-07T01:11:15.257995442Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["filters","ftui","tui"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.1.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:42.225747238Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:28:24.546240365Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2noh9.3.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-06T07:43:41.823264327Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
